title: Annual deaths from all natural disasters
note: Based on recorded events; coverage is more limited before the year 2000. Longer historical trends may partly reflect reporting improvements.

title: Number of reported natural disaster events
note: Data includes disasters reported up to April 2026.

title: Decadal average: Annual death rate from all natural disasters
note: Based on recorded events; coverage is more limited before the year 2000. Longer historical trends may partly reflect reporting improvements.
citation: EM-DAT, CRED / UCLouvain (2026); Population based on various sources (2024)
